scene_summary: Soviet-era brutalist residential courtyard at golden hour sunset, melancholic yet warm in mood.

animatables.element: Sun rays and lens flare glow through archway opening
animatables.location: Center-right, low on horizon through the concrete archway

animatables.element: Tall overgrown grass and wildflowers in the open field
animatables.location: Center and right of scene, between buildings and path

animatables.element: Low shrubs and weeds bordering the gravel path
animatables.location: Left foreground and center foreground flanking the path

animatables.element: Birch and deciduous trees visible between buildings
animatables.location: Center background and right background near distant buildings

animatables.element: Scattered clouds in the sky above the scene
animatables.location: Upper half of equirectangular image, across the sky band

animatables.element: Dust and particle motes in the golden light shafts under the concrete overhang
animatables.location: Under the large concrete arch, center of scene

animatables.element: Subtle pulsing of the golden sunlight intensity as clouds drift across the sun
animatables.location: Entire scene lighting, most visible on illuminated wall surfaces

animatables.element: Dense bush on the right side of the archway
